docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-10-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE ON BENCH WARRANT (ISSUED ON OCT-15-2012) (SERVICE FEE $120.00) AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBA, SHARON

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO OCT-31-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH HAVE AGREED THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL PAY $50.00 PER MONTH STARTING JULY 29, 2011. PARTIES AGREE THAT THE PAYMENTS WILL INCREASE OVER TIME FROM/TO $100.00, $150.00, AND $200.00 DUE MONTHLY UNTIL PAID IN FULL. NO SET SCHEDULE GIVEN FOR THE PAYMENT INCREASES. CONTINUE IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT IF NO PAYMENTS ARE RECEIVED SHE MAY REQUEST THAT MATTER BE ADVANCED ON CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE PROOF OF SERVICE AND DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-23-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUL-11-2011 1:30 SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS OFF CALENDARED. MATTER TO BE ADDED TO OEX CALENDAR.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHARON GAMBA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBA, SHARON

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2012 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-16-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2012 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(JC) AND DEFENDANT(JD). THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT THE DEFENDANT(JD) WILL PAY TO PLAINTIFF(JC) $400.00 BY MARCH 1, 2012, AND $200.00 EACH MONTH THROUGH JULY, 2012. IF NO APPEARANCE ON JUNE 11, 2012, CONTINUE IN THREE MONTH INTERVALS. BENCH LETTER WITHDRAWN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHARON GAMBA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 1000.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,180.00 FILED BY HAGERSTRAND, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBA, SHARON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THIS IS A DUMMY CLAIM WHICH WAS CREATED FOR THE PURPOSE OF SETTING UP A HEARING DATE FOR AN ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FOR AN OUTSIDE COUNTY JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT FOR CASE NO. 272-10SC WAS ENTERED ON NOV-15-2010 IN NEVADA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,000 (PRINCIPAL) AND $180 (COSTS) AGAINST JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHARON GAMBO.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2012 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-27-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBA, SHARON HEARING SET FOR NOV-26-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
